summary.description: Concise description of the metadata linking outcome: entities extracted, links created, and embedding preparation status.

decision.description: Outcome of the metadata linking step.

evidence.description: Key facts and rationale supporting entity extraction, cross-document links, and retrieval-assisted matches.

entities.description: Normalized entities extracted from the ingested batch (compounds, phases, endpoints, datasets, specimens, trials).

category.description: Entity type such as Compound, Study phase, Primary endpoint, Dataset, Specimen, or Trial.

version.description: Version, protocol revision, or effective date when known; otherwise a dash.

links.description: Relationships between source documents and linked targets (datasets, studies, compounds, trials, labels).

fromDocument.description: Source document title or identifier from the ingested batch.

toTarget.description: Linked entity, dataset ID, study code, or persisted entity ID.

relationship.description: Short relationship label such as references dataset, defines study, or analytical record for compound.

entityIds.description: Persisted-style entity or link IDs confirmed or produced during linking (RDOC-, TRIAL-, DATASET-, CMP-, LINK-, LBL-, REG-).

vectorsIndexed.description: Count of content chunks prepared for Cohere Embed indexing after linking. Use 0 when no embeddable content is ready.
